item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":false,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":false,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.96,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"过去三周退货率升高、满意度下降、平均处理时长拉长；现在要判断是否更换物流商，请给我决策框架。"}],"abstain_reason":"No prior local repair history is present; the conversation contains only an initial request for a decision framework."}
